title: codereview-pass-2: codec.py and headers.py RPL_DAO model alignment with Rust compress_rpl_dao and spec/03-adaptation.md
description: No discrepancies found in residue construction (hop_limit+IID+instance+kd_flags+seq+dodagid). Python general codec matches Rust specialized functions for rule 4. Updated comments to reference adaptation.md:101. All schc_compression.json vectors validate. Mimics Rust style exactly.
